title: Burgundy Masterclass — Thursday June 26
body: Join our head sommelier for an exclusive vertical tasting of Domaine Leroy spanning 2015–2020. Limited to 12 guests. Paired dinner included.

title: Summer Allocation: Screaming Eagle 2022
body: We've secured a small allocation of Screaming Eagle 2022. Select members have first access before public offering. Limit 1 bottle per member.

title: New Arrival: Sassicaia 2021
body: The 2021 Sassicaia has arrived and it's exceptional — potentially the wine of the vintage. Now available by the bottle and by the glass on Fridays.
